intro: Tithymalus humilis, also known as Euphorbia humilis, is a succulent plant species native to Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been associated with various health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and protection against oxidative stress.
